Healthy and productive Juneberry trees - three total - between Wilmot and Marcy. They need time to ripen, but when ripe, brace yourselves in the best of ways! Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: June-July.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
